prompt: A [hero ingredient] in its [natural or harvested state] — [lens] close, the ingredient filling the frame with its [defining surface quality], [light source] treating it as a portrait subject rather than a product, [color detail] the full palette of this ingredient's exterior and any visible interior, [context detail] establishing provenance without becoming a landscape shot, the ingredient photographed with the same consideration given to a human portrait, cinematic ingredient portrait still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
